currentMetrics.name: Water Consumption Reduction
currentMetrics.description: Reduction in water usage per garment compared to 2020 baseline through advanced washing technologies and water recycling systems.

currentMetrics.name: Renewable Energy Usage
currentMetrics.description: Percentage of total energy from solar panels and renewable sources. We've installed 5MW of solar capacity across our facilities.

currentMetrics.name: Waste Recycling Rate
currentMetrics.description: Percentage of production waste diverted from landfills through recycling and upcycling programs.

currentMetrics.name: Carbon Footprint Reduction
currentMetrics.description: Reduction in CO2 emissions per unit produced through renewable energy, efficient logistics, and process optimization.

currentMetrics.name: Sustainable Materials
currentMetrics.description: Percentage of products made with organic, recycled, or sustainable materials including GOTS organic cotton and GRS recycled polyester.

currentMetrics.name: Women in Workforce
currentMetrics.description: Percentage of female workers across all facilities, with dedicated women empowerment and leadership development programs.

currentMetrics.name: Worker Training Hours
currentMetrics.description: Annual training hours provided to workers for skill development, safety, and career advancement.

currentMetrics.name: Community Investment
currentMetrics.description: Percentage of annual revenue invested in local community development, education, and healthcare programs.

currentMetrics.name: Safety Incident Rate
currentMetrics.description: Workplace safety incident rate per 100 workers, tracked monthly with continuous improvement initiatives.

currentMetrics.name: Supplier Audits Completed
currentMetrics.description: Percentage of suppliers audited annually for ethical compliance, environmental standards, and labor practices.

goals.title: Net Zero by 2030
goals.description: Achieve net-zero carbon emissions across all operations through renewable energy, carbon offsets, and sustainable practices.

goals.title: 100% Sustainable Materials
goals.description: Transition all production to certified organic, recycled, or sustainable materials by 2027.

goals.title: Zero Liquid Discharge
goals.description: Implement zero liquid discharge systems across all washing facilities by 2026.

goals.title: Fair Wage Guarantee
goals.description: Ensure all workers earn above living wage with comprehensive benefits by 2025.

initiatives.title: Solar Power Expansion
initiatives.description: Installation of 10MW solar panels across all facilities to achieve 75% renewable energy by 2026.
initiatives.impact: Expected to reduce CO2 emissions by 5,000 tons annually

initiatives.title: Water Recycling Plant
initiatives.description: State-of-the-art water treatment and recycling system that recycles 90% of washing water.
initiatives.impact: Saves 2 million liters of water monthly

initiatives.title: Organic Cotton Partnership
initiatives.description: Direct partnerships with 150+ organic cotton farmers in Bangladesh to secure sustainable raw materials.
initiatives.impact: Supports 500+ farming families with fair prices

initiatives.title: Women Empowerment Program
initiatives.description: Leadership training, skills development, and career advancement programs for female workers.

initiatives.title: Community Healthcare Center
initiatives.description: Free healthcare facility providing medical services to workers and local community members.

initiatives.title: Circular Fashion Initiative
initiatives.description: Textile waste collection and upcycling program to create new products from production scraps.
initiatives.impact: Diverts 100+ tons of textile waste from landfills annually
